nasb.text: They will gird themselves with sackcloth and shuddering will overwhelm them; and shame will be on all faces and baldness on all their heads.

esv.text: They put on sackcloth, and horror covers them. Shame is on all faces, and baldness on all their heads.

cnv.text: 他們必用麻布束腰，戰兢把他們遮蓋， 各人的臉上滿是羞愧，各人的頭上都光禿。

ccb.text: 他们必身披麻衣，战栗发抖。他们必剃光头发，满面羞愧。
